detail.description:
Long ago, the legendary Star Savior defeated the Void Star.
Now, the Journey—a trial to inherit the great power he left behind—begins once more.
Take on the Journey alongside star-powered girls and inherit the legacy of the Star Savior.

A training RPG to raise a new shining light to illuminate the cosmos in an age where the stars are fading.
StarSavior: Guide your Saviors through the star-kissed Journey.

■ A Journey with girls who wield the power of the stars
You become the Captain of the Savi

Added new products
Fixed some bugs
